SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement

Annotation Interface JkDepSuggest

@Target({PARAMETER,METHOD,FIELD}) public @interface JkDepSuggest
Tag to let IDE recognise that the value can be suggested with dependency coordinate

  • Optional Element Summary

    Optional Elements
    Modifier and Type
    Optional Element
    Description
    String
    hint
    We can specify a query to narrow the search, such as "com.google.guava:guava-".
    boolean
    versionOnly
    Mention that we are interested in retrieving versions only.

  • Element Details

    • hint

      String hint
      We can specify a query to narrow the search, such as "com.google.guava:guava-".

      An arbitrary list can also be specified by using a comma-separated string, combined with versionOnly=true.

      Example:

      Default:
      ""

    • versionOnly

      boolean versionOnly
      Mention that we are interested in retrieving versions only. If true, this has to be used in conjunction of hint() by specifying a complete group and name as *com.google.guava:guava:*
      Default:
      false
